supply_chain.dependencies: Reliance on third-party couriers for payroll check delivery, financial institutions for ACH and wire transfers, third parties for technology and content support, time clock manufacturing, and background check processing
supply_chain.risks: Third parties may not perform as expected, global economic slowdown could affect third-party providers, systemic shutdown of banking industry or Federal Reserve disruption would impede payroll services

regulatory_risks: Fair Credit Reporting Act compliance for background checks
Federal government contracting regulations including equal employment opportunity requirements
California Consumer Privacy Act (CCPA) and California Privacy Rights Act (CPRA)
European Union General Data Protection Regulation (GDPR)
Canadian Personal Information Protection and Electronic Documents Act (PIPEDA)
Mexico Federal Law on Protection of Personal Data
AI and machine learning regulatory restrictions (EU AI Act, Colorado Artificial Intelligence Act)
Economic and trade sanctions (U.S. Treasury OFAC)
Bank Secrecy Act and USA Patriot Act compliance
Money transmitter and money services business licensing requirements
Affordable Care Act (ACA) employer reporting requirements
State and federal employment laws (Fair Labor Standards Act, Family Medical Leave Act, etc.)
State consumer privacy laws (Texas Data Privacy and Security Act, New York SHIELD Act)
Ban the box and fair chance hiring laws
Sales and use tax regulations for services provided electronically
OCC regulation of Paycom National Trust Bank

sanction_risks: Blocked countries and specially designated individuals restrictions
Geopolitical tensions (Russia-Ukraine conflict, Israel-Hamas conflict, China tensions) may create heightened cybersecurity attack risks
